$description: Toggle Solutions design tokens — Stage 3. Extracted where Stages 1–2 shipped a value; minted where the canon is silent — every minted value carries '(minted)' in its $description and is open to Zaid's override. Naming: category.role.variant[.state]; every color carries explicit .light/.dark siblings. Consumers: web generators skip the `print` group; `motion.*-reduced` requires a hand-written prefers-reduced-motion block; tabular numerals require a custom transform (see typography.scale.numeric-display $extensions). Human companion: TOKENS.md.

light.$description: Blueprint blue — locked (Zaid, 2026-06-10), sampled from the Sunway proposal isometric blocks. Display/numeral/illustration ONLY on light: 3.84:1 on canvas.light (large text ≥18.66px bold). Body-size blue uses brand.primary-deep.

dark.$description: Blueprint blue on dark. 4.86:1 on canvas.dark — passes large text + graphics; body-size still uses primary-deep.dark.

light.$description: CANONICAL text-safe blue (minted Stage 2 QA): small text, bands, pills, table headers, links, focus. 6.36:1 on canvas.light; white on this fill 6.36:1. Aliased by link/focus-ring/info — edit here, propagates.

dark.$description: Text-safe blue on dark. 6.52:1 on canvas.dark. (minted)

light.$description: Wordmark ink on light (measured — Sunway cover; 'black' = system ink, not #000000). 19.17:1 on canvas.light. Reproduce only from assets/logos/toggle-wordmark.svg.

dark.$description: Wordmark white on dark. 18.67:1 on canvas.dark. Never any other color.

light.$description: Page/slide ground, light (proposals, reports). Companion of every .light text token.

dark.$description: Deep navy ground — locked interim (BRAND-IDENTITY §4); deck migrates off pure black. Companion of every .dark text token.

light.$description: Stat/campaign card fill (measured — Sunway). 1.09:1 vs canvas.light.

dark.$description: Card tint — dark elevation step 1 (tint, not shadow). 1.10:1 vs canvas.dark. Rounded from DNA range #0F1830–#121B36. (minted)

light.$description: Raised card on light — white + elevation.2.light shadow.

dark.$description: Raised tint — dark elevation step 2. 1.23:1 vs canvas.dark. (minted)

light.$description: Modal/dialog surface on light — white + elevation.3.light.

dark.$description: Overlay tint — dark elevation step 3, topmost. 1.41:1 vs canvas.dark. (minted)

light.$description: Periwinkle data-panel tint (measured — Sunway). 5th surface role beyond the brief's four — disclosed, TOKENS.md §8.

dark.$description: Callout tint on dark — blue-shifted step between card and raised. (minted)

light.$description: Headings, stat numerals. 19.17:1 on surface.canvas.light, 17.28:1 on surface.card.light.

dark.$description: Headings, stat numerals. 18.67:1 on surface.canvas.dark, 16.94:1 on surface.card.dark.

light.$description: Body copy. 8.86:1 on surface.canvas.light, 7.99:1 on surface.card.light.

dark.$description: Body copy. 9.37:1 on surface.canvas.dark, 8.51:1 on surface.card.dark.

light.$description: Secondary/supporting text; also the strikethrough struck-line color (SIGNATURE-DEVICES §B1). 4.83:1 on surface.canvas.light, 4.36:1 on surface.card.light. 4.36:1 on card.light — at body size use on canvas; on card require ≥18.66px bold.

dark.$description: Secondary/supporting text; also the strikethrough struck-line color (SIGNATURE-DEVICES §B1). 7.4:1 on surface.canvas.dark, 6.71:1 on surface.card.dark.

light.$description: DECORATIVE ONLY (both modes) — watermarks, seals at caption scale. 2.64:1 on canvas.light: never carries content (BRAND-IDENTITY §4).

dark.$description: Decorative only — same fence. 4.07:1 on canvas.dark. (minted)

light.$description: Text on dark fills within light mode. 6.36:1 on brand.primary-deep.light fills.

dark.$description: Text on light fills within dark mode. 16.1:1 on a #B0B8C9 fill; verify per fill. (minted)

light.$description: Links — aliases primary-deep (6.36:1 on canvas.light).

dark.$description: Links on dark — aliases primary-deep (6.52:1 on canvas.dark).

light.$description: Visited links (minted). 6.35:1 on surface.canvas.light, 5.73:1 on surface.card.light.

dark.$description: Visited links (minted). 6.86:1 on surface.canvas.dark, 6.22:1 on surface.card.dark.

light.$description: Hairline dividers, C2 rows (measured — Stage 2). 1.2:1 vs canvas.light — decorative delineation only.

dark.$description: Subtle border on dark (DNA range lower bound). 1.31:1 vs canvas.dark.

light.$description: Default component border. 1.44:1 vs canvas.light — decorative; form-input boundary strategy decided Stage 6a (TOKENS.md §8). (minted)

dark.$description: Default border on dark. 1.58:1 vs canvas.dark. (minted — ladder extension beyond DNA's single observed border)

light.$description: Emphasized border / table outer rule. 2.64:1 vs canvas.light.

dark.$description: Strong border on dark. 2.46:1 vs canvas.dark. (minted — ladder extension)

light.$description: Focus border — aliases state.focus-ring.

dark.$description: Focus border on dark — aliases state.focus-ring.

light.$description: Checkbox/radio boundary — the boundary IS the component, needs ≥3:1 (4.83:1 on canvas.light). (minted, Stage 6a)

dark.$description: Control boundary on dark. 4.07:1 on canvas.dark. (minted, Stage 6a)

state.$description: Semantic interaction/validation colors — orthogonal to categorical accents. All minted (no shipped state UI yet); hexes deliberately distinct from accent.*.text so 'success' never collides with 'teal category'.

light.$description: Hover wash — ink at alpha 0F (5.9%) over the resting surface. Slides users: use the precomputed flats in TOKENS.md §1.5. (minted)

dark.$description: Hover wash — white at alpha 14 (7.8%). (minted)

light.$description: Active/pressed wash — ink at alpha 1F (12.2%). (minted)

dark.$description: Active wash — white at alpha 29 (16.1%). (minted)

light.$description: Disabled fill/text + opacity.40 on the component. 2.64:1 — intentionally sub-AA (disabled elements are WCAG-exempt). (minted)

dark.$description: Disabled on dark. 4.07:1. (minted)

light.$description: Focus ring — aliases primary-deep (6.36:1 on canvas.light; passes 3:1 non-text).

dark.$description: Focus ring on dark — aliases primary-deep (6.52:1).

light.$description: Error text/icon. 5.68:1 on canvas.light; white on this fill 5.68:1. (minted)

dark.$description: Error on dark. 7.35:1 on canvas.dark. (minted)

light.$description: Success text/icon. 6.51:1 on canvas.light. Distinct from accent.cat-2.text by design. (minted)

dark.$description: Success on dark. 10.09:1. (minted)

light.$description: Warning text/icon. 5.44:1 on canvas.light. Distinct from accent.cat-5.text by design. (minted)

dark.$description: Warning on dark. 10.11:1. (minted)

light.$description: Info — aliases primary-deep.

dark.$description: Info on dark — aliases primary-deep.

light.$description: Modal backdrop — navy at alpha 99 (60%). (minted)

dark.$description: Backdrop on dark — black at alpha A6 (65%). (minted)

light.$description: Hover wash OVER COLORED FILLS (buttons) — 10%; the 6% surface wash is imperceptible on saturated fills. (minted, Stage 6a)

dark.$description: Hover wash over fills, dark. 10%. (minted, Stage 6a)

light.$description: Active wash over colored fills — 16%. (minted, Stage 6a)

dark.$description: Active wash over fills, dark. 16%. (minted, Stage 6a)

cat-1.$description: Categorical accent — blue. Categorical (which thing this is), never semantic (good/bad).

light.$description: Fill on light. 3.84:1 on canvas.light.

dark.$description: Fill on dark. 4.86:1 on canvas.dark.

light.$description: Text-safe blue — SCOPE: dataviz labels + web UI only; on proposal/Slides surfaces accent-coded text stays ink or body gray (PROPOSAL-MASTER §0). 6.36:1 on canvas.light.

dark.$description: Text-safe blue on dark — same scope. 6.52:1 on canvas.dark.

cat-2.$description: Categorical accent — teal. Categorical (which thing this is), never semantic (good/bad).

light.$description: Fill on light. 2.05:1 on canvas.light. Below 3:1 — banding/stripe color beside labeled text only, never a standalone meaning-carrying mark.

dark.$description: Fill on dark. 9.09:1 on canvas.dark.

light.$description: Text-safe teal — SCOPE: dataviz labels + web UI only; on proposal/Slides surfaces accent-coded text stays ink or body gray (PROPOSAL-MASTER §0). 5.33:1 on canvas.light. (minted)

dark.$description: Text-safe teal on dark — same scope. 9.09:1 on canvas.dark. (minted)

cat-3.$description: Categorical accent — pink. Categorical (which thing this is), never semantic (good/bad).

light.$description: Fill on light. 1.98:1 on canvas.light. Below 3:1 — banding/stripe color beside labeled text only, never a standalone meaning-carrying mark.

dark.$description: Fill on dark. 9.44:1 on canvas.dark.

light.$description: Text-safe pink — SCOPE: dataviz labels + web UI only; on proposal/Slides surfaces accent-coded text stays ink or body gray (PROPOSAL-MASTER §0). 5.25:1 on canvas.light. (minted)

dark.$description: Text-safe pink on dark — same scope. 9.44:1 on canvas.dark. (minted)

cat-4.$description: Categorical accent — purple. Categorical (which thing this is), never semantic (good/bad).

light.$description: Fill on light. 3.89:1 on canvas.light.

dark.$description: Fill on dark. 4.8:1 on canvas.dark.

light.$description: Text-safe purple — SCOPE: dataviz labels + web UI only; on proposal/Slides surfaces accent-coded text stays ink or body gray (PROPOSAL-MASTER §0). 6.35:1 on canvas.light. (minted)

dark.$description: Text-safe purple on dark — same scope. 6.86:1 on canvas.dark. (minted)

cat-5.$description: Categorical accent — orange. Categorical (which thing this is), never semantic (good/bad).

light.$description: Fill on light. 2.45:1 on canvas.light. Below 3:1 — banding/stripe color beside labeled text only, never a standalone meaning-carrying mark.

dark.$description: Fill on dark. 7.62:1 on canvas.dark.

light.$description: Text-safe orange — SCOPE: dataviz labels + web UI only; on proposal/Slides surfaces accent-coded text stays ink or body gray (PROPOSAL-MASTER §0). 4.85:1 on canvas.light. (minted)

dark.$description: Text-safe orange on dark — same scope. 9.04:1 on canvas.dark. (minted)

cat-6.$description: Categorical accent — slate. Categorical (which thing this is), never semantic (good/bad).

light.$description: Fill on light. 13.81:1 on canvas.light.

dark.$description: Fill on dark. 3.99:1 on canvas.dark. Re-minted for dark — light slate is invisible on navy (1.35:1). (minted)

light.$description: Text-safe slate — SCOPE: dataviz labels + web UI only; on proposal/Slides surfaces accent-coded text stays ink or body gray (PROPOSAL-MASTER §0). 13.81:1 on canvas.light. (minted)

dark.$description: Text-safe slate on dark — same scope. 7.38:1 on canvas.dark. (minted)

duotone.$description: The imagery treatment (BRAND-IDENTITY §7, locked pre-flight #3). Two-stop gradient map.

light.$description: Duotone shadow stop, light surfaces = blueprint blue.

dark.$description: Duotone shadow stop, dark surfaces = deep navy (tonal order preserved — highlights stay lighter).

light.$description: Duotone highlight stop, light = paper-white (interim lock finalized here).

dark.$description: Duotone highlight stop, dark = blueprint blue.

light.$description: Chart series 1 — blue.

dark.$description: Series 1 on dark.

light.$description: Chart series 2 — teal.

dark.$description: Series 2 on dark.

light.$description: Chart series 3 — pink.

dark.$description: Series 3 on dark.

light.$description: Chart series 4 — purple.

dark.$description: Series 4 on dark.

light.$description: Chart series 5 — orange.

dark.$description: Series 5 on dark.

light.$description: Gridlines — aliases border.subtle; used at 100%, no extra opacity.

dark.$description: Gridlines on dark.

light.$description: Axis lines + ticks — aliases border.strong (labels use text.secondary).

dark.$description: Axis on dark.

light.$description: Alternate-row/area banding — aliases surface.card.

dark.$description: Banding on dark.

light.$description: Series-1 light tint — grouped-bar second member, area filled terrain. (minted, Stage 4)

dark.$description: Series-1 tint on dark. (minted, Stage 4)

primary.$description: Locked (pre-flight #2). All display, headings, body, numerals, UI. No italics in v1; weights 400/500/700/800 of Inter Tight's 9 (decision rule 3 — fewer variants; disclosed TOKENS.md §8).

wordmark.$description: BRAND MARK ONLY (pre-flight #1) — never typeset; reproduce from assets/logos/toggle-wordmark.svg.

scale.$description: Core ramp. Sizes in CSS px at the 1280-wide reference; Slides pt = px × 0.5625 — USE THE PT COLUMN IN TOKENS.md §3, never px-as-pt. Component-level sizes (bands, seals, library slides) live in PROPOSAL-MASTER §4 and normalize to this ramp on next touch. letterSpacing in px at reference size.

display.$description: Cover names, hero headlines. Tracking minted (HTML sets none).

h1.$description: Slide titles (brand.primary on light). lineHeight normalized from HTML 1.08. Tracking minted.

h2.$description: Section headings. (minted — no Stage 2 use; fills the ramp gap for web)

body.$description: Default body. (Stage 2's 14.5px bands and 13.5px bullets normalize to 14/13 on next touch — TOKENS.md §8.)

small.$description: Bullets, cells — FLOOR for projected surfaces.

caption.$description: Decorative captions, watermarks, seals — color.text.muted only.

numeric-display.$description: Stat numerals — ALWAYS tabular (see $extensions; standard tools drop unknown composite keys — custom transform required; in Figma set tabular figures on the text style's OpenType features). Ink by default; brand.primary for the single focal stat per surface.

numeric-mid.$description: Mid stat (channel slides). Stage 2's 34px normalizes here on next touch (TOKENS.md §8).

space.$description: 4pt baseline, 12 steps. Stage 2's off-scale gaps (14/20/26/28/30/56) normalize here on next touch (TOKENS.md §8).

none.$description: Tables, full-bleed bars, isometric artwork — drawn things have corners.

lg.$description: Cards, callout panels, icon chips. Supersedes Stage 2's 10px/6pt — HTML + recipes update on next touch. (Slides: 6.75pt)

pill.$description: Buttons + budget pills only — the CTA shape.

icon-size.$description: Icon grid (scope Layer 2; construction grammar lands in Stage 5). (minted)

elevation.$description: Uniform shadow type per level; dark mode's value is 'none' because dark elevates by SURFACE TINT (surface.card/raised/overlay.dark), never shadow.

light.$description: Resting card lift.

dark.$description: No shadow — use surface.card.dark tint.

light.$description: Raised — dropdowns, hover lift.

dark.$description: No shadow — use surface.raised.dark tint.

light.$description: Overlay — modals, toasts.

dark.$description: No shadow — use surface.overlay.dark tint.

motion.$description: (minted — durations/curves are system decisions, no shipped motion yet)

fast-reduced.$description: prefers-reduced-motion fallback — snap. Requires a hand-written media-query block in CSS.

slow-reduced.$description: Reduced fallback — content appears in final position.

base.$description: The house curve — decisive start, settled end.

toggle-flip.$description: RESERVED for the signature toggle-flip. Provisional — finalized Stage 10 (drawing-in: linear-then-decelerate, never bouncy).

light.$description: Alias of state.focus-ring.

dark.$description: Alias of state.focus-ring.

print.$description: Print/PDF geometry (mm/pt — typed as number with unit in description, since W3C dimension permits only px/rem) + CMYK in $extensions. CMYK is naive uncoated conversion — proof with the vendor before any paid run. Web generators skip this group.

margin-a4.$description: mm — page margin, A4 proposal PDF (= 0.45in slide margin).

safe-area.$description: mm — keep text/seals inside trim by this much.

stroke-a4.$description: pt — DEFAULT isometric stroke at A4 (SIGNATURE-DEVICES §A1).

min-stroke.$description: pt — absolute isometric stroke floor in print.
